code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    else if b == 45 and not have
      neg = true
      have = true
    else if b == 43 and not have
      have = true
    else
      if have
        mut out = val * 2
        if neg
          out = -out
        end
        if first
          result = "#{out}"
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{out}"
        end
        val = 0
        neg = false
        have = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    mut out = val * 2
    if neg
      out = -out
    end
    if first
      result = "#{out}"
      first = false
    else
      result = "#{result} #{out}"
    end
  end
  println(result)
end
